title: [release-1.11-rhel] CVE-2022-27651: do not set the inheritable capabilities
body:
The kernel never sets the inheritable capabilities for a process, they are only set by userspace. Emulate the same behavior.

Closes: CVE-2022-27651

Cherry-picked from https://github.com/containers/buildah/commit/e7e55c988c05dd74005184ceb64f097a0cfe645b for GHSA-c3g4-w6cv-6v7h applied to the main branch.
